channel.title: Create FortiGate VMs :: SE How-To Build Lab
channel.description: RDP to OOB. ​ from Terminal in OOB cd /home/fortinet/automation/ansible/fortinet ./copy_fgt_bootstrap_iso.sh ../vars/all-hosts.yml <name of your PVE server> ./create-vm.sh ../vars/all-hosts.yml <name of your PVE server> fortigate_sdwan v7.6.3.F ./start_remove_vm.sh ../vars/all-hosts.yml <name of your PVE server> fortigate_sdwan started Make sure all FortiGate VMs have fully started before exeucting the following. Suggest opening console windows and verifying login prompt showing.
